title: Tangy Sweet Saudi Arabian Nectarine Skewers
description: A light and refreshing Saudi Arabian dish featuring nectarines, with a tangy and sweet flavor profile, perfect for warm weather, this dish is also low in carbs and friendly to those watching their carb intake.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, honey, rose water, cardamom powder, salt, and black pepper to make the mother sauce.
Add the chopped pistachios to the bowl and stir to combine.
Thread the nectarine wedges onto skewers, leaving a small space between each wedge.
Brush the nectarine skewers with olive oil on both sides.
Grill the nectarine skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they have nice grill marks.
Brush the nectarine skewers with the mother sauce during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them cool for a minute or two.
Serve the Tangy Sweet Saudi Arabian Nectarine Skewers warm, garnished with additional chopped pistachios if desired.
